title: Starting a new club
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Our school has recently started a film club, and I joined it last week. I have always been interested (27) films, but I had never discussed them seriously with other students before. The club meets every Thursday after lessons, and each week we watch part of a film or talk about a director. Our teacher asked us to choose a short scene and explain why it was important (28) the story. At first, I was nervous about speaking, but everyone listened carefully. One student said my ideas were clearer (29) I thought they were. Next month, we are going to make our own short film, which sounds exciting. We will need to work (30) a team and share different jobs, such as writing, filming and editing. I think the club is useful (31) students who enjoy being creative. I am already excited (32) the next meeting.

questions.explanation: Fixed phrase: work as a team.
